mcpServers.countPolicy: Count only formally integrated upstream servers that expose a real MCP protocol transport. First-party in-process plugins never count toward this target.

agentSkills.countPolicy: Count only public web-ready or verified skills whose source bundle, Chinese adaptation, permissions, capability-level Web workflow, and applicable tests are complete.

blockedSkillReasons.skill-airtable-cli: Requires an Airtable account, PAT, CLI installation, and live record mutation that are unavailable for verification.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-airtable-filters: Requires an authenticated Airtable workspace and live base data that are unavailable for verification.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-airtable-overview: The upstream plugin workflow depends on an authenticated Airtable account; only the document snapshot is currently available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-appkit-interop: Requires macOS, Xcode, and AppKit runtime verification; the current Windows host cannot execute it.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-build-run-debug: Requires macOS, Xcode, simulator or device tooling; the current Windows host cannot execute it.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-building-ai-agent-on-cloudflare: Deployment and representative remote scenarios require a Cloudflare account and credentials that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-canva-branded-presentation: Requires an authenticated Canva account and editable design access that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-canva-resize-for-all-social-media: Requires an authenticated Canva account and editable design access that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-canva-translate-design: Requires an authenticated Canva account and editable design access that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-circleci-builds: Requires an authenticated CircleCI project and token that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-circleci-cli: Requires CircleCI CLI authentication and a live project that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-circleci-config: Representative validation depends on a CircleCI account/project and remote config processing that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-code-review: Requires the external CodeRabbit service and repository access; only the instruction document is currently available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-expo-cicd-workflows: End-to-end EAS workflow verification requires an Expo account and credentials that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-expo-deployment: Store, hosting, and EAS deployment verification requires external accounts, credentials, and platform access that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-expo-dev-client: Representative distribution requires an Expo or Apple account and device/platform access that are not available.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-expo-ui-jetpack-compose: Representative execution requires Android build tooling/emulator or hardware that is not installed on this host.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-expo-ui-swift-ui: Representative execution requires macOS, Xcode, and Apple platform runtime access unavailable on this host.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-github: Requires a connected GitHub account and authenticated repository/PR operations that are not available for this integration.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-swiftui-ui-patterns: Requires macOS/Xcode execution and 30 missing upstream reference files before representative validation.
blockedSkillReasons.skill-swiftui-view-refactor: Requires macOS/Xcode execution for representative compile and UI validation on a platform unavailable to this host.
